project_name: Act 4 — Multi-Variant Text Analysis and Generation

Text-GAN.outcome_note: Discriminator dominance after epoch 4; mode collapse observed

key_findings: BERT achieved the strongest task-specific performance (Macro-F1 0.838) due to supervised stability.
GPT reduced perplexity 4.7x from baseline, demonstrating effective domain adaptation.
Text-GAN exhibited Discriminator dominance and mode collapse — a documented failure mode for small-corpus text GANs.
All three models trained in under 5 minutes each on a T4 GPU.
The three paradigms (encoding, generation, adversarial) have meaningfully different stability profiles.
